title: DescribeUploadBufferOutput
description: DescribeUploadBufferOutput schema from Amazon Storage Gateway API

allOf.description: An array of the gateway's local disk IDs that are configured as working storage. Each local disk ID is specified as a string (minimum length of 1 and maximum length of 300). If no local disks are configured as working storage, then the DiskIds array is empty.
The total number of bytes being used in the gateway's upload buffer.
The total number of bytes allocated in the gateway's as upload buffer.
